_meta.comment: English message bundle. Mirrors cs.json key-for-key.

Sbirka.metaDescription: Gallery of every four-leaf clover find with filters and search.
Sbirka.totalSummary: {count, plural, =0 {0 finds} one {# find} other {# finds}}{withSuffix, select, yes { in total} other {}}
Sbirka.filterMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 finds match} one {# find matches} other {# finds match}} the filter.

FindDetail.anonymizedNotice: This find is anonymized — its coordinates, notes and exact location are hidden on the public site.
FindDetail.anonymizedLocationNotice: The real location of an anonymized find isn't shown. You're seeing the default placeholder location {placeholderId} instead.
FindDetail.formerLocationNotice: This location no longer physically exists (built over, terrain change, etc.). The map shows the original spot.
FindDetail.noLocation: No location is assigned to this find.
FindDetail.distanceTitle: Great-circle distance from the GPS centre of the default location map #00001
FindDetail.offsetTitlePolygon: Great-circle distance from the location polygon edge (0 = inside the AOI)
FindDetail.offsetTitleCenter: Great-circle distance from the location map's GPS centre
FindDetail.mapMarkerOutside: The find's GPS lies outside the area captured by this location map.
FindDetail.mapMarkerNoGps: The find has no recorded GPS coordinates — its position can't be drawn on the map.
FindDetail.anonMapAria: The location of the anonymized find is hidden
